rule_id: # VALIDATION RULES - Structured Rules for Automated Data Checking
# Purpose: 40+ validation rules for regulatory data quality assurance

description: sign
Assets must equal Total liabilities-and-minority-interest plus Total equity capital (= BHCK3300). Minority interest is already inside BHCK2948 - do not add BHCK3000 separately
error_message: Balance sheet does not balance: BHCK2170 != BHCK2948 + BHCK3210

description: Total Assets must equal Total Liabilities and Equity (Item 29)
error_message: Total assets does not match total L+E

description: Total Assets must equal sum of all asset line items. Item 2 (securities) is a caption with no atomic code; use its components BHCKJJ34 (HTM) + BHCT1773 (AFS) + BHCKJA22 (equity).
error_message: Total assets does not equal sum of components

description: Total Liabilities must equal sum of all liability line items. Item 13 (deposits) is a caption with no atomic code; use deposit components BHDM6631 + BHDM6636 + BHFN6631 + BHFN6636.
error_message: Total liabilities does not equal sum of components

description: Total Equity must equal sum of equity components
error_message: Total equity does not equal sum of components

description: Total Assets must be non-negative
error_message: Total assets is negative

description: Total Liabilities must be non-negative
error_message: Total liabilities is negative

description: Total Equity should typically be positive
error_message: Total equity is negative - investigate

description: Cash must equal noninterest-bearing + interest-bearing
error_message: Cash subtotals do not add up

description: Total Deposits (HC item 13) must equal domestic (noninterest BHDM6631 + interest-bearing BHDM6636) plus foreign (noninterest BHFN6631 + interest-bearing BHFN6636). Item 13 is an FR Y-9C caption with NO atomic consolidated MDRM code; expressed via real components.
error_message: Deposit subtotals do not add up

description: HTM securities on HC must equal HC-B total HTM
error_message: HTM securities do not tie between HC and HC-B

description: AFS securities on HC must equal HC-B total AFS
error_message: AFS securities do not tie between HC and HC-B

description: AFS total must equal sum of AFS security types
error_message: AFS components do not sum to total

description: HTM total must equal sum of HTM security types
error_message: HTM components do not sum to total

description: AFS fair value must be non-negative
error_message: AFS fair value is negative

description: HTM amortized cost must be non-negative
error_message: HTM amortized cost is negative

description: Gross loans on HC must equal HC-C total
error_message: Loans do not tie between HC and HC-C

description: ALLL on HC must equal HC-C ALLL
error_message: Allowance does not tie between HC and HC-C

description: Net loans must equal gross loans - unearned - allowance
error_message: Loan calculation does not reconcile

description: RE loans must equal sum of RE subcategories. Item 1.d (closed-end 1-4 family) is a subtotal with no atomic code; use first-lien BHCK5367 + junior-lien BHCK5368.
error_message: RE loan components do not sum

description: Loan loss allowance must be non-negative
error_message: ALLL is negative

description: ALLL ratio should be between 0% and 10%
error_message: ALLL ratio outside normal range

rule_id: # SECTION 4: TRADING VALIDATION - HC-D and HC-L (6 rules)

description: Trading assets on HC must equal HC-D total
error_message: Trading assets do not tie between HC and HC-D

description: Trading liabilities on HC must equal HC-D total
error_message: Trading liabilities do not tie between HC and HC-D

description: Derivatives positive FV must reconcile to HC-L
error_message: Derivatives positive FV does not reconcile

description: Derivatives negative FV must reconcile to HC-L
error_message: Derivatives negative FV does not reconcile

description: Trading assets must equal sum of components
error_message: Trading assets components do not sum

description: Positive fair value must be non-negative
error_message: Positive FV value is negative

description: Tier 1 must equal CET1 + Additional Tier 1
error_message: Tier 1 capital does not reconcile

description: Total Capital must equal Tier 1 + Tier 2
error_message: Total capital does not reconcile

description: CET1 equals CET1 subtotal (after adjustments) minus total adjustments and deductions
error_message: CET1 calculation does not reconcile

description: CET1 ratio should be between 4.5% and 30%
error_message: CET1 ratio outside normal range

description: Tier 1 ratio should be between 6% and 30%
error_message: Tier 1 ratio outside normal range

description: Total capital ratio should be between 8% and 35%
error_message: Total capital ratio outside normal range

description: Leverage ratio should be between 4% and 15%
error_message: Leverage ratio outside normal range

description: Risk-weighted assets must be positive
error_message: RWA is zero or negative

rule_id: # SECTION 6: INCOME STATEMENT VALIDATION - HI (5 rules)

description: NII must equal Interest Income - Interest Expense
error_message: NII calculation does not reconcile

description: Interest income must equal sum of sources (loans 4010 + lease income 4065 + balances due 4115 + securities 4060 + trading assets 4069 + other interest income 4518)
error_message: Interest income components do not sum

description: Interest expense must equal sum of sources. Item 2.a (interest on deposits) is a caption with no atomic consolidated code; use components: domestic time deposits BHCKHK03 + BHCKHK04 + foreign-office deposits BHCK4172, plus fed funds expense BHCK4180, trading liabilities and other borrowed money BHCK4185, and subordinated notes BHCK4397.
error_message: Interest expense components do not sum

description: NII/Assets ratio should be reasonable
error_message: NII ratio outside normal range

description: Interest income should be non-negative
error_message: Interest income is negative

description: Other assets on HC must equal HC-F total
error_message: Other assets do not tie between HC and HC-F

description: Other liabilities on HC (BHCK2750) must equal HC-G item 5 total (BHCT2750) per the official form
error_message: Other liabilities do not tie between HC and HC-G

description: Other assets must equal sum of HC-F components (accrued interest receivable BHCKB556 + net DTA BHCK2148 + ... + customers' acceptance liability BHCK2155)
error_message: Other assets components do not sum

description: Other liabilities must equal sum of HC-G components (net DTL BHCK3049 + ACL on off-balance sheet exposures BHCKB557 + all other BHCKB984); item 1 is not applicable
error_message: Other liabilities components do not sum

description: Total assets should not change more than 50% quarter over quarter
error_message: Unusually large change in total assets

description: Total equity should not change more than 30% quarter over quarter
error_message: Unusually large change in equity

description: Net income should exist in prior periods (continuity check)
error_message: Missing historical net income data

description: CET1 ratio should not change more than 500bps QoQ
error_message: Unusually large change in CET1 ratio

description: Large trading asset changes should be investigated
error_message: Unusually large change in trading assets

rule_id: # SECTION 9: QUARTERLY AVERAGES & FAIR VALUE VALIDATION - HC-K and HC-Q (8 rules)
# Verified against rebuilt csv/HC_K_QUARTERLY_AVERAGES.csv and csv/HC_Q_FAIR_VALUE.csv.
# NOTE: HC-K item 5 (BHCK3368) is NOT the sum of items 1-4.b per FR Y-9C
#   instructions - no sum rule for it. HC-H has no totals row - no sum rules.

description: Average total consolidated assets (Fed validity edit 2770) must be greater than zero
error_message: Quarterly average total assets is zero or negative (Fed edit 2770)

expected_result: BHCYJA36 + BHCKG478 + BHCKG483 + BHCKG488 + BHCT3543 + BHCKG497 + BHCKG391
description: Total assets at fair value (item 7 Col A) must equal per-column sum of items 1-6
error_message: HC-Q item 7 Column A does not equal sum of items 1-6

expected_result: BHCKF252 + BHCKG507 + BHCT3547 + BHCKG516 + BHCKG521 + BHCKG526 + BHCKG805
description: Total liabilities at fair value (item 14 Col A) must equal per-column sum of items 8-13
error_message: HC-Q item 14 Column A does not equal sum of items 8-13

description: Total assets row: Total FV (Col A) must equal Level1 + Level2 + Level3 minus netting (Col C+D+E-B)
error_message: HC-Q item 7 grid identity A=C+D+E-B does not hold

description: Total liabilities row: Total FV (Col A) must equal Level1 + Level2 + Level3 minus netting (Col C+D+E-B)
error_message: HC-Q item 14 grid identity A=C+D+E-B does not hold

description: Total assets measured at fair value must be non-negative
error_message: HC-Q total fair-value assets is negative

description: Total liabilities measured at fair value must be non-negative
error_message: HC-Q total fair-value liabilities is negative

description: Earning assets repricing/maturing within one year must be non-negative
error_message: HC-H repriceable earning assets is negative
